text:
Edwin Groothuis (edwin@FreeBSD.org) wrote:
> Maintainer of net/p5-IP-Country,

> Please note that PR ports/139229 has just been submitted.

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/139229

i just tested it and the result looks good.
i approve this PR. 


thanks!

-dikshie-
